title: taraxacum kojimae
intro: Taraxacum kojimae, also known as Japanese dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Japan and Korea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum kojimae include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and reduce blood pressure. Taraxacum kojimae can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine in Asia.
